 +  where False = is_search_keyword_required_popup_displayed()
 +    where is_search_keyword_required_popup_displayed = <src.pages.kurly_main_page.KurlyMainPage object at 0x7f79ef7a5810>.is_search_keyword_required_popup_displayed
